publications.title: Improving Stream-flow Prediction in Snow-Dominated Regions using Pretrained Fusion Attention Models
publications.description: Working under the guidance of Dr Nilanjan Ray at the University of Alberta to develop long-term (seasonal) river water-flow forecasting in data-scarce & snow-dominated river basins using large scale pretraining on a novel attention-fusion architecture along with specialized multi-stage finetuning for the Bow river basin near Calgary.

publications.title: High-Quality 3D Biomedical Image Generation using Generative Adversarial Networks
publications.publication: Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS)
publications.description: Created a novel generative model for generating high-resolution 3D medical images for image augmentation, addressing data scarcity in medical imaging applications.

links.title: Generation of Data for Training Retinal Image Segmentation Models

publications.title: Using Attention-Based Auto-encoders for Catheter Path Reconstruction in Ultrasound Images
publications.description: Worked with Dr. Elodie Lugez at Toronto Metropolitan University to create a novel architecture for tracking and localization of catheters in 3D ultrasound images of the prostate.

publications.title: Retinal Blood Vessel Segmentation from Fundus Images
publications.description: Worked with Dr Anindya Sen at Heritage Institute of Technology, Kolkata to create a novel architecture for efficient blood vessel segmentation of colour fundus images.

publications.title: Exploring the Effects of Data Augmentation for Drivable Area Segmentation
publications.description: Conducted research dealing with the various weather scenarios that an autonomous vehicle encounters. Proposed a novel data augmentation and driving area segmentation model to achieve real-time detection in various challenging conditions.
researchFocus: Robust computer vision under adverse conditions
